calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-111 novelty drive: RNG desync between arms (supersedes 141c)
items.note: 141c C0 sanity check fired correctly: per_seed_action_divergence=[0,0,0] arms bit-identical despite novelty_bonus_weight=100, one-hot nav_bias, raised nav_bias=0.5. Root cause: random.seed(seed) at start of _run_single resets identical RNG stream in both arms; nav_bias decisions and override actions desync only via paired-RNG. 141d: random.seed(seed if novelty_enabled else seed+7777). Env still _make_env(seed) so paired comparison preserved at env level. Smoke confirms divergence=0.53 (vs 141c's 0.0).

items.title: MECH-307 3-arm gap decomposition + Path B consumer conjunction read
items.note: Phase 1 follow-on after V3-EXQ-539 PARTIAL-PASS (substrate counters C1-C4 PASS, behavioural C5 FAIL because legacy MECH-295 cue path does not read the conjunction signal). 3-arm gap decomposition: ARM_0_off / ARM_1_signed_pe (Gap 1 only) / ARM_2_full (all 4 gaps). MECH-295 bridge extended with Path B compute_conjunction_score_bias() that reads VALENCE_WANTING + VALENCE_LIKING + signed VALENCE_SURPRISE + z_beta arousal at each candidate's predicted-imminent location and applies an additional approach bias when the four-way conjunction holds. Bridge consumer-conjunction-read flag ON in ALL arms so ARM_2 has the downstream consumer that EXQ-539 lacked. ARM_3 (SD-014 6-channel fallback) DEFERRED -- if this experiment PARTIAL-PASSes (C1+C2 only), ARM_3 becomes the natural follow-on. Acceptance: C1 substrate-readiness counter dissociation (Gap 1 isolates in ARM_1, all four fire only in ARM_2), C2 conjunction-read fires in ARM_2 only with per-seed-mean rate >= 0.10, C3 approach_commit_rate ARM_2 >= ARM_0 + 0.10 in 2/3 seeds AND ARM_2 > ARM_1. Smoke 2026-05-08 PASSes C1 dissociation in dry-run; C2/C3 cannot exercise in dry-run (6 episodes -> 0 contacts -> goal never seeded -> conjunction read skipped). Anchor doc: REE_assembly/docs/architecture/anticipatory_affect_conjunction_vs_dual_channel.md.

items.title: MECH-204 precision recalibration consumer (Phase 1 validation)
items.note: Sleep-substrate plan Phase 1 (REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sleep_substrate_plan.md GAP-1) validation of the WRITEBACK-phase MECH-204 precision recalibration consumer. ARM_0 = use_rem_precision_recalibration=False (baseline, bit-identical to legacy WRITEBACK); ARM_1 = use_rem_precision_recalibration=True with rem_precision_recalibration_step=0.1 (Option A linear interpolation on E3._running_variance toward 1.0/precision_at_rem_entry). Hazard-heavy / resource-thin CausalGridWorldV2 (num_hazards=6, num_resources=2, env_drift_prob=0.5) drives sustained PE variance between sleep cycles; sleep_loop K=2 fires 4 cycles per 8-episode run. Acceptance: C1 substrate-readiness (mech204_recalibration_fired=1.0 every cycle in >=2/3 ARM_1 seeds), C2 movement-direction consistency (sign(rv_after-rv_before) matches sign(target_variance-rv) on cycles 2..N AND mean_abs_delta >= 1e-3), C3 cross-arm divergence (mean post-cycle rv differs by >= 5%). First-cycle no-op behaviour expected (target == rv_at_rem_entry by construction); meaningful movement measured on cycles 2..N. Contract suite landed 2026-05-08: 9/9 MECH-204 contracts + 237/237 preflight + contracts PASS with flag OFF (bit-identical) and ON (wiring fires). Companion proposal EXP-MECH204-STEP-SWEEP queued in experiment_proposals.v1.json for tuning rem_precision_recalibration_step post-PASS.
